Paragraph
Then in a similar way one can show the existence of a unique fixed point in \(\overline{B({\mathbf x}_{0}, \delta)}\) of \(\phi \) when \(\delta>0\) and \(r>0\) are chosen appropriately so that \(\phi\) satisfies (4.5.3) for \({\mathbf x} \in B({\mathbf x}_{0}, \delta), {\mathbf y}\in B({\mathbf y}_0, r) \text{.}\) This shows the existence of \({\mathbf x} = {\mathbf u}({\mathbf y})\) for \({\mathbf y}\in B({\mathbf y}_0, r) \text{.}\)
in-context
